title: Nevermore
description: Improves vanilla progression with new equipment tiers, items with abilities, and rewarding structures.
body:
## About
Nevermore is a mod that expands Minecraft’s progression by introducing a new ore tier (Silver), along with custom tools, weapons, and armor featuring unique abilities. These include items for combat, movement, and utility.

The mod also adds new structures—some are essential for progression, while others are optional challenges that offer valuable rewards. A new brewing system based on flowers, along with special materials like Cursed Steel.

For a detailed overview of crafting, mechanics, and progression, see the wiki linked below.

## Info
Mod Wiki: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1n0Y4VSm_jR4yitgE7gflEkE8uqHVisixpW8ohWkG4D0/edit?tab=t.0

**Note:** This mod is primarily focused on equipment and progression. It is recommended to use it alongside other content mods. Feel free to include it in modpacks.
